name: dunya-analiz
description: Dünya Gelecek Tahmin & Analiz Sistemi — uzayda dönen 3D Dünya üzerinde tarafsız, çok perspektifli ülke analizi

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,scheduler,web -c blue,magenta,yellow,green "npm run dev -w @dunya/api" "npm run dev:worker -w @dunya/api" "npm run dev:scheduler -w @dunya/api" "npm run dev -w @dunya/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @dunya/api && npm run build -w @dunya/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @dunya/api && npm run lint -w @dunya/web
